atcddd 0.2.0

Crawl the WHO ATC/DDD Index

Source: R/crawl.R
atc_crawl.Rd

Iteratively traverses ATC codes starting from one or more root codes, respecting rate limits and using the HTTP layer's caching. Returns two tidy tables: codes (unique ATC codes with names) and ddd (dose definitions and related fields).

Usage

atc_crawl(
  roots = atc_roots_default(),
  rate = 0.5,
  progress = interactive(),
  max_codes = Inf,
  quiet = FALSE
)

Arguments

roots

Character vector of root ATC codes to start from. Must be uppercase codes. Default: atc_roots_default().

rate

Numeric; minimum seconds between HTTP requests (default: 0.5).

progress

Logical; show a progress bar (default: interactive()).

max_codes

Integer; limit on number of codes to visit (default: Inf).

quiet

Logical; reduce informational messages (default: FALSE).

Value

A list with codes and ddd tibbles.

See also

atc_write_csv(), atc_roots_default()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
res <- atc_crawl(roots = "D", rate = 0.8, max_codes = 50)
head(res$codes)
head(res$ddd)
} # }
